descriptionShort: Box score from Saskatchewan vs. UBC college hockey game on November 29, 1986.
descriptionLong: Box score and game summary from a college hockey matchup between Saskatchewan and UBC on November 29, 1986, published in the Star-Phoenix. Saskatchewan defeated UBC with goals from Sakundiak, Morrison, and others. The game featured multiple penalties and power-play opportunities, with Saskatchewan converting 3 of 12 power plays while UBC was 0-for-8.
